items.title: Koza Altın İşletmeleri A.Ş. - 2024 Mineral Resource and Reserve Report
items.content:
Koza Altın İşletmeleri A.Ş. announced the 2024 Mineral Resource and Reserve Report, showing an increase in total mine reserve amount by 86,000 ONS (3.5%) to 2,551,000 ONS compared to the 2023 report. The total mine resource amount in the Measured and Indicated categories increased by 126,000 ONS to 3,662,000 ONS.

The 2024 UMREK (National Mineral Resource and Reserve Reporting Commission) report indicates a rise in total mine reserves to 2,551,000 ONS. Factoring in the 100,382 Altın ONS mine production in 2024, the effective increase in mine reserves from 2023 is 187,000 ONS. Measured and Indicated resources increased by 126,000 ONS to 3,662,000 ONS, while Possible resources increased by 22,000 ONS to 5,404,000 ONS. The total value of mine reserves increased by USD 1,608,443,000 to USD 6,691,273,000 as of December 31, 2024, and further to USD 7,729,530,000 as of April 7, 2025.
